justification: The diff successfully migrates javax to jakarta namespaces and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the override, leaving the class extension intact). It also introduces a behavioral change in HomeController.java by replacing session.invalidate() with request.logout(), which may not be equivalent. The migration of commons-email to commons-email2-jakarta is correct, but the diff contains some unnecessary churn like removing unused imports in DAO files.
